name: FRANCIS PAUL AMADEO
summary: A Full Stack software engineer with experience in Learning Management Systems and Internal Tools and a strong focus in process optimization.
bio:
In my tenure with Epic Systems’ LMS developer team, I would lead projects from gathering requirements to shipping in production. Within my first year, my projects were able to save the company over 500 annual hours of internal and manual processing. 

 This led to me quickly taking ownership over different functionalities and features in the EpicU system, such as our E-learning platform, our install scheduling tool, and our training billing processes, to name a few.In these roles, I would regularly meet with key stakeholders to provide project status updates and to ensure the developers’ timelines and releases align with their long term goals. 

 Currently, I am a Freelance Software Engineer that analyzes an organization's process and improve on them by providing software tools and automation

Music: Ang Pag-Ibig ay Kanibalismo II — fitterkarma
Books: No Matter The Wreckage — Sarah Kay
7 Habits of Highly Effective People — Stephen R. Covey(Currently Reading)
